'''DVL-181''', nicknamed the '''Quagmire''' and the '''Slime Pit''', was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] base built on a remote [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was formerly known as the '''Aracara Testing Facility''' and was used as a corporate weapons and material testing zone. When it proved to be unprofitable, it was abandoned.<ref name="HS" />

DVL-181 hosted the [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] of the [[Silverblade X-wing squadron]]. It used a [[LongView-382.X]] [[Sensor array/Legends|sensor array]].<ref name="HS" />
